title: Risk Register Entry
description: A single entry in the waterfall project risk register, capturing likelihood, impact, score, mitigation, and current status.

description.description: Clear description of the risk event and its potential effect

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this risk was identified or is most relevant

category.description: Risk category for classification and reporting

likelihood.description: Likelihood of the risk materialising (1=very low, 5=very high)

impact.description: Severity of impact if the risk materialises (1=negligible, 5=critical)

owner.description: Person or role responsible for monitoring and managing this risk

mitigation_plan.description: Planned actions to reduce probability or impact of the risk

due_date.description: Date by which mitigation actions must be completed (ISO 8601)

created_at.description: Date the risk was first identified (ISO 8601)

updated_at.description: Date the risk entry was last updated (ISO 8601)
